Home

More Rows

Appendix to The Natural Framework. The tables could be a hundred rows. Here are the ones we cut. Each is prior art.

Dating (weeks)

Step 
PerceiveSee profile, meet at event
CacheProfile construction, signaling, mutual model-building
FilterSwipe, ghost, “not feeling it”
Attend(dim) No diversity enforcement, same top profiles
Consolidate“We” emerges, shared narrative
RememberRelational history, mutual model

Friendship (years)

Step 
PerceiveMeet someone, first impression
CacheLearn about them, categorize
FilterTime scarcity forces displacement
AttendDunbar’s number: ~5 close, ~150 total
ConsolidateShared history becomes shorthand
RememberThe inner circle, the trust graph

Markets (months)

Step 
PerceivePrice signal, market data
CacheOrder book formation
FilterBids compete, orders cancel
AttendIndex inclusion: finite slots, sector weights
Consolidate(dim) Index rebalancing, sector rotation
RememberClosing prices, the permanent record

Education (months)

Step 
PerceiveStudent level, subject matter, constraints
CacheSyllabus, lesson sequence, concept graph
FilterRemove low-yield topics and exercises
AttendClass time allocation, what gets emphasis
ConsolidateRevision from previous cohorts, better explanations
RememberCurriculum, trained students, institutional materials

Cooking (hours)

Step 
PerceiveTaste, smell, season
CacheMise en place, prep
FilterTaste and adjust, discard failures
AttendMenu composition, balance flavors
ConsolidateRecipe written down, technique internalized
RememberThe cookbook, the family recipe

Product Management (quarters)

Step 
PerceiveUser research, bugs, usage data, strategy inputs
CachePRD, problem framing, roadmap slices
FilterBacklog pruning
AttendSprint/quarter prioritization under capacity
ConsolidateRetros, metric learning, workflow adaptation
RememberShipped product, docs, customer habits

Urban Planning (years)

Step 
PerceivePopulation, traffic, land use, complaints
CacheZoning maps, plans, scenarios
FilterPublic comment, feasibility, environmental review
AttendCapital allocation, corridor prioritization
ConsolidatePhased implementation, code updates
RememberBuilt city form, infrastructure lock-in

Intelligence Analysis (weeks)

Step 
PerceiveRaw reports, intercepts, open-source inputs
CacheFusion, timeline, link analysis
FilterSource validation, contradiction resolution
AttendAnalyst focus under scarce policymaker attention
ConsolidateAssessments, estimates, confidence updates
RememberDossiers, watchlists, institutional memory

Photography (hours)

Step 
PerceiveSee the scene, light, moment
CacheCompose, frame, expose
FilterChimp the LCD, delete the misses
AttendSelect the edit from hundreds of frames
ConsolidatePost-process, sequence, the contact sheet
RememberThe print, the portfolio, the archive

Parenting (years)

Step 
PerceiveObserve the child, see what they need
CacheRoutines, boundaries, environment design
FilterPick battles, let the small stuff go
AttendQuality time under finite energy
ConsolidateReflect, adjust approach, internalize what works
RememberThe relationship, the values transmitted

Film Editing (weeks)

Step 
PerceiveDailies, raw footage
CacheSelects, bins, string-outs
FilterKill the bad takes
AttendScene selection for the cut
ConsolidateAssembly → rough → fine cut
RememberThe final cut, the release print

Winemaking (months)

Step 
PerceiveGrape harvest, terroir, vintage conditions
CacheCrush, press, must preparation
FilterSorting table — reject unripe, damaged
AttendFermentation decisions: yeast, oak, temperature
ConsolidateBarrel aging
RememberThe bottled vintage

Competitive Sports (seasons)

Step 
PerceiveScouting, combine, tape
CacheEvaluation, grading, ranking
FilterCuts — most prospects don’t make the roster
AttendRoster construction, positional balance
ConsolidateOffseason refinement: cut, trade, re-sign
RememberHall of Fame, the record book

Museum Curation (years)

Step 
PerceiveDiscover, acquire, donate
CacheCatalog, restore, provenance
FilterDeaccession, storage — most art never shown
AttendExhibition: finite wall space, thematic balance
ConsolidatePermanent collection organization
RememberThe collection, the canon of art

Translation (weeks)

Step 
PerceiveRead source text
CacheParse meaning, register, structure
Filter(dim) No batch elimination — judgment is continuous
AttendChoose the rendering per phrase
ConsolidateRevise, polish, harmonize voice
RememberThe published translation

Therapy (months)

Step 
PerceivePatient presents, symptoms, history
CacheAssessment, case formulation
FilterTriage: what to work on first
AttendSession agenda under finite time
ConsolidateIntegration, schema revision
RememberChanged behavior, internalized skills

Diplomacy (years)

Step 
PerceiveCables, intelligence, events
CachePosition papers, talking points
FilterNon-starters eliminated early
AttendSummit agenda: finite time, competing priorities
ConsolidateTreaty ratification, implementation
RememberInternational law, norms, precedent

Fashion (seasons)

Step 
PerceiveFabric, trend signals, cultural moment
CacheDesign, sketch, sample, collection
FilterFit sessions — kill what doesn’t work on body
AttendRunway curation: what to show, how to style
ConsolidateBuyer orders, production refinement
RememberThe retail floor, the classic piece

Podcast (weeks)

Step 
PerceiveResearch, guest, topic
CacheRecord, segment, timestamp
FilterEdit: cut dead air, tangents, bad takes
Attend(dim) Most shows publish everything they record
ConsolidateListener feedback, format iteration
RememberThe catalog, the archive

Military Campaign (months)

Step 
PerceiveIntelligence, reconnaissance, terrain
CacheOrders of battle, logistics, planning
FilterScreen: reject infeasible options
AttendCommander’s intent, force allocation
ConsolidateAfter-action review, adaptation
RememberDoctrine, lessons learned

Gardening (months)

Step 
PerceiveSoil, climate, seed stock
CachePlan beds, spacing, succession planting
FilterThin seedlings, pull weeds
AttendWater and sun allocation, what thrives
ConsolidateHarvest, save seed from the best
RememberThe garden next year, the seed library

Game Design (months)

Step 
PerceivePlaytest, player data, feedback
CacheDesign doc, feature list, prototype
FilterKill features that don’t test well
AttendPillar definition, scope cut to shippable
ConsolidatePatches, live ops, iteration
RememberThe shipped game, the franchise

Mythology (centuries)

Step 
PerceiveGods, heroes, origin events ← Oral Tradition’s Remember
CacheRetelling, ritual, iconography
FilterForgotten gods die — no worshippers, no story
AttendSyncretism: Zeus absorbs local thunder gods
ConsolidatePantheon formation, canonical genealogies
RememberThe myth cycle, the cosmogony → Religion’s Perceive

Religion (millennia)

Step 
PerceiveThe myth cycle, prophetic revelation ← Mythology’s Remember
CacheTheology, doctrine, commentary
FilterHeresy suppressed, schism
AttendCanon formation: which books survive, which are apocrypha
ConsolidateCouncils, creeds, catechisms
RememberThe institution, canon law → Law’s Perceive

Forensics (weeks)

Step 
PerceiveCrime scene, physical evidence, witness accounts
CacheCollect, catalog, chain of custody
FilterExclude contaminated, irrelevant
AttendSelect probative evidence for the case
ConsolidateLab analysis, reconstruction, synthesis
RememberThe forensic report → Law’s Perceive

Archaeology (months)

Step 
PerceiveSurvey, test pits, remote sensing
CacheExcavate, catalog, context recording
FilterMost sherds discarded, keep diagnostics
AttendSignificant finds selected for analysis
ConsolidateTypology, dating, site interpretation
RememberThe site report, the collection → Museum Curation’s Perceive

Clinical Trials (years)

Step 
PerceiveHypothesis from preclinical data ← Science’s Remember
CacheProtocol design, patient recruitment
FilterExclusion criteria, screen patients
AttendEndpoint selection, interim analysis
ConsolidateStatistical analysis, adaptive modification
RememberPublished results, approved drug → Prescribing’s Perceive

Prescribing (minutes)

Step 
PerceivePatient presents, symptoms, vitals ← Clinical Trials’ Remember
CacheDifferential diagnosis, history review
FilterRule out: contraindications, interactions
AttendTreatment selection under formulary constraints
ConsolidateFollow-up, dose adjustment
RememberThe patient record → Therapy’s Perceive

Oral Tradition (generations)

Step 
PerceiveHear the story, witness the event
CacheRetell, rehearse, perform
FilterWeak stories forgotten — nobody retells them
AttendPerformers choose repertoire for the occasion
ConsolidateVersions merge, details sharpen through retelling
RememberThe myth, the epic → Translation’s Perceive

Seed Breeding (years)

Step 
PerceiveObserve traits in the field ← Gardening’s Remember
CacheGrow trial plots, measure, record
FilterCull weak performers
AttendSelect for target traits: yield, flavor, resistance
ConsolidateCross, backcross, stabilize
RememberThe new cultivar, the seed catalog → Gardening’s Perceive

Epidemiology (months)

Step 
PerceiveCase reports, surveillance data ← Immune at population scale
CacheContact tracing, exposure mapping
FilterCase definition: true positives from noise
AttendOutbreak prioritization, cluster focus
ConsolidateModeling, intervention design
RememberGuidelines, the epidemiological record

Cartography (months)

Step 
PerceiveSurvey, satellite, sensor data
CacheGeoreferencing, layering, projection
FilterGeneralization: select features at target scale
AttendSymbolization: what to emphasize
ConsolidateMulti-pass editing, field verification
RememberThe published map → Urban Planning’s Perceive

Librarianship (years)

Step 
PerceivePublications arrive ← Publishing’s Remember
CacheCatalog, classify, shelve
FilterCollection development: weed by circulation
AttendReference: guide patron to the right source
ConsolidateCollection assessment, interlibrary loan
RememberThe collection, the catalog → Education’s Perceive

Documentary (months)

Step 
PerceiveResearch the archive ← Journalism’s Remember
CacheShoot interviews, collect footage, acquire archival
FilterKill dead footage, bad interviews
AttendNarrative structure: what story to tell
ConsolidateEdit passes, sound design
RememberThe released film

Logistics (weeks)

Step 
PerceiveDemand signals, inventory, lead times
CacheForecast, order planning
FilterReorder threshold: stock or skip
AttendAllocation: route, warehouse, customer priority
ConsolidateRoute optimization, carrier review
RememberThe supply network, the vendor scorecard → Markets’ Perceive

Apprenticeship (years)

Step 
PerceiveWatch the master work ← any craft’s Remember
CachePractice techniques, drills
FilterMistakes corrected, bad habits broken
AttendMaster assigns progressively harder work
ConsolidateJourneyman piece: integration of skills
RememberThe craft passed on, the lineage

Cut beats

Paragraphs that were true but slowed the arc of The Natural Framework.

What changes across rows: The clock speed. The substrate. The vocabulary.

Convergent solutions: Consolidation showed the pipeline converges on the Transformer architecture. That was one row’s evidence. The tables add fifty-eight more. The same pattern appears wherever the constraint appears. A narrow basin of convergent solutions: systems under finite capacity with selection pressure arrive at the same six-step shape. The timescale is irrelevant. The steps are not.

Nature solved it: The immune system runs all six steps with no central coordinator. Evolution runs bright filter, attend, and consolidate despite dim perceive and structure, and it works over megayears.

Linked lists

The rows link forward. Each Remember is a pointer to another row’s Perceive. Here are chains we found.

The creative chain: neurons → cognition → writing → publishing → reading → cognition (loop). Cortical storage becomes what you perceive on screen. Publishing becomes what you read as research. The backlist becomes a book a reader opens. Output becomes input.

The career chain: birth → school (broken) → college (broken) → hiring (broken) → promotion → prestige. Each node’s dim cells compound into the next. School’s filter has no competitive inhibition (age-based promotion). College’s attend is GET * (GPA, no diversity across skills). Hiring inherits unstructured inputs. Dim cells propagate across nodes, not just downstream within a row.

The knowledge chain: science → curricula → education → cognition → writing → science (loop). Papers consolidate into textbooks. Textbooks become curricula. Curricula shape what students perceive. Students become researchers who observe new phenomena. The loop closes.

The infrastructure chain: evolution → neurons → cognition → writing code → computation → inference → agent → writing code (loop). The genome encodes the brain. The brain writes code. Code runs on hardware. Hardware runs inference. Inference powers agents. Agents write more code.

The medicine chain: science → clinical trials → prescribing → therapy → changed behavior. Papers become hypotheses. Approved drugs become options on the formulary. The patient record becomes the therapist’s intake.

The story chain: oral tradition → mythology → religion → law. Tales become myths. Myths become doctrine. Doctrine becomes canon law. Canon law becomes common law. The longest chain in the list: four domains from campfire to courtroom.

The book chain: oral tradition → translation → publishing → librarianship → education → cognition (loop). The myth gets translated. The translation gets published. The book gets shelved. The student opens it.

The evidence chain: forensics → law → precedent → law school → practice (loop). The forensic report enters the courtroom. The decision becomes precedent. Precedent becomes curriculum. Curriculum shapes the next lawyer’s practice.

The land chain: cartography → urban planning → architecture → the built city. The map becomes the zoning plan. The plan constrains the architect. The building constrains the next map.

The seed chain: gardening ↔ seed breeding (loop). The seed library feeds the breeder’s trial plots. The new cultivar feeds next year’s garden. The shortest chain in the list: two nodes, one loop.

The record chain: journalism → documentary. The archive becomes the source material. The released film becomes what the next journalist perceives as context.

Any composable unit of competition for selection works this way. Thirty-six rows here, twenty-four in the main post, and there are always more.

edit CC BY-SA 4.0
